name: bluecat-am-query-ip

outputs.description: The address manager ID of the IP address. BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.Name Name of the IP address.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.ID

outputs.description: Corresponding MAC address. BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.Parents.ID ID of the parent IP address.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.MacAddress

outputs.description: Type of the parent IP address. BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.Parents.Name Name of the parent IP address.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.Parents.Type

outputs.description: Classless Inter-Domain Routing. BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.Type Type of IP address.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.Parents.CIDR

outputs.description: Address of IP. BlueCat.AddressManager.IP.Parents.Prefix Prefix of the IP address.
outputs.name: IP.Address
